title: OREGON POST ADOPTION RESOURCE CENTER - 211info
text: OREGON POST ADOPTION RESOURCE CENTER OREGON POST ADOPTION RESOURCE CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Supports Oregon adoptive families, state-assisted guardians, and adult adoptees with services like specialized consultations, supportive listening, resource referrals, and free training for families and the professionals who serve them. 6443 SW Beaverton Hillsdale Highway Suite 205 Portland, OR 97221 Eligibility: The organization provides full support to all adoptive and assisted guardianship families in Oregon, adult adoptees, and offers some services to resource families and the professionals who support them Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 241-0799 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 241-0799 Toll-free (800) 764-8367 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, or visit website for more information FEES: No cost to eligible families DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on the second floor of the Raleigh West Building, accessible by Trimet bus lines 54, 55, and 56. Services: Adoption Services Parent Counseling * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Specialized Information and Referral * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Workshops/Symposiums * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: INFORMATION SERVICES - TRAINING CALENDARS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON POST ADOPTION RESOURCE CENTER
